connectionMessages.authCodeReady: Approve the matching Companion prompt in YTMDesktop. The widget will finish pairing automatically.
connectionMessages.authFailed: Pairing was not completed. Generate a new code, then press Allow in YTMDesktop.
connectionMessages.authRequired: Companion authorization is required before the widget can connect.
connectionMessages.storedAuthRejected: YTMDesktop rejected the stored Companion authorization. Reconnect to retry, or clear authorization before pairing again.
connectionMessages.credentialNotPersisted: YTMDesktop approved pairing, but secure credential storage did not retain the token. Resolve the storage problem and generate a new code.
connectionMessages.credentialStorage: Secure credential storage is unavailable. Check Windows Credential Manager and try again.
connectionMessages.authorizationDisabled: Authorization requests are disabled in YTMDesktop. Enable Companion authorization requests and try again.
connectionMessages.notRunning: Waiting for YTMDesktop to start its Companion Server.
connectionMessages.apiUnavailable: Companion API is unavailable right now.
connectionMessages.socketError: The realtime connection was interrupted. Retrying shortly.
connectionMessages.socketClosed: The Companion connection closed. Retrying shortly.
connectionMessages.unexpected: The Companion connection returned an unexpected error. Try reconnecting.

discovering.title: Finding your player
discovering.body: Looking for a local YTMDesktop Companion Server and restoring the previous session.

disconnected.title: Open YTMDesktop to continue
disconnected.body: The widget only talks to the official Companion Server API. Start YTMDesktop and keep its Companion Server enabled.

auth_required.title: Authorize this widget
auth_required.body: Generate a pairing code, compare it with the YTMDesktop prompt, and confirm access.

authenticating.title: Waiting for approval
authenticating.body: Approve the code inside YTMDesktop. The widget will connect as soon as the Companion Server grants access.

paused.title: Playback is paused
paused.body: Your last track is ready whenever you want to continue.

empty.title: Nothing is playing
empty.body: Pick a track in YTMDesktop and the widget will update instantly.

reconnecting.title: The stream is waking back up
reconnecting.body: Companion updates paused for a moment. The widget is retrying with backoff in the background.

error.title: The connection needs attention
error.body: The API responded with an unexpected error. You can retry now or re-authorize the widget from settings.

settingsWindow.title: Widget Settings
settingsWindow.subtitle: Refine the connection, display, and window behavior without leaving the now-playing surface.

api.title: API / Connection
api.description: Manage Companion API availability, pairing state, and recovery actions.
api.endpointInvalid: Use host:port or a local http URL, for example 127.0.0.1:9863.

ui.title: UI / Display
ui.description: Control how much UI stays visible when the widget is idle.
ui.hideControlsDescription: Remove transport buttons from the compact layout.
ui.showControlsOnHover: Show playback controls only on hover
ui.showControlsOnHoverDescription: When enabled, controls stay in place and appear only while hovering over the widget.
ui.artworkPlaybackControlDescription: Make the full artwork clickable and reveal the current play or pause action while hovering over the widget.
ui.hideProgressDescription: Remove elapsed time and the scrubber from the compact layout.
ui.hideTrackDetailsDescription: Remove the track details block from the compact layout.
ui.connectionBadgeVisibilityDescription: Choose whether the LIVE status stays visible, appears only on hover, or remains fully hidden.
ui.hideSettingsButtonDescription: When enabled, the settings button appears only while hovering over the widget.
ui.hideCloseButtonDescription: When enabled, the close button appears only while hovering over the widget.
ui.themeDescription: Choose Dark or Light explicitly, or let System follow the Windows theme.

appearance.title: Transparency / Background
appearance.description: Adjust the window layers while keeping text and controls fully legible.
appearance.windowSurfaceDescription: Controls the glass surface behind the widget content without fading controls or text.
appearance.artworkBackgroundDescription: Controls how strongly the blurred current artwork appears behind the widget.
appearance.gradientOverlayDescription: Controls the themed gradient that keeps content readable over the artwork.

window.title: Window / Behavior
window.description: Tune the widget’s desktop presence on Windows.
window.alwaysOnTopDescription: Keep the widget floating above your regular windows.
window.startupDescription: Start the widget automatically when you sign in to Windows.

dev.title: Developer
dev.description: Use the simulator without weakening the production integration path.
dev.sourceModeDescription: Auto uses the real Companion bridge in Tauri and the simulator in browser previews.

about.title: About
about.description: Project metadata for this desktop widget.
